cards.front: What is the time complexity of the brute force approach for the Traveling Salesman Problem?
What does the term 'exhaustive search' refer to?
cards.back: A method of solving a problem by checking every possible solution

cards.front: What is the Brute Force Approach?
cards.back: A method of solving a problem by checking every possible solution, often using a systematic and exhaustive search

cards.front: What is the time complexity of the brute force approach for the Brute Force Algorithm?
What is the advantage of the Exhaustive Search method?
cards.back: It provides an exact solution to the problem, but is often impractical due to its high time complexity
